transcript: Then I entered junior college. Uh, it was a new place, new people, new friends. So I somehow gathered the courage to put my name down to participate in the fashion show. And I think that is where it all started. Just it was something very minor, you know, just putting my name down in the list for participating in the fashion show. But that ignited a confidence in me and made me realize that hey, I really do love this world of fashion and glamour. So after I got out of junior college, I did something I never thought I would do. I was scrolling on Facebook. And I saw this advertisement for a pageant called Style Diva that was being conducted by one of India's leading magazine. So without thinking, without even telling my parents, I gathered some of my pictures and I mailed it to them. Mailing them those pictures was probably the best decision I ever made.
